corePolicy.agentPromotionRule: Promote only after repeated use proves independent state, separate responsibility, or permission separation.
corePolicy.automationPromotionRule: Promote to Automation/Cron only after manual execution, failure boundaries, stop paths, and report channels are verified.
corePolicy.memoryPolicy: Allow only bounded daily Knowledge Loop memory append with same-day deduplication; do not promote unconfirmed agreement assets.
corePolicy.doctorPolicy: Use beai-doctor as the package runtime diagnosis surface for BEAI-owned OpenClaw reliability, package consistency, Trust Gate status, Knowledge Loop operations, and connector onboarding risk.
corePolicy.telegramDeliveryPolicy: For Telegram direct conversations, internal final_answer/private final text is not delivery. reply_payload_sending is only a delivery candidate. Completion requires source-channel message_sent success and Telegram messageId evidence before user-visible closeout claims. Long-running Telegram-driven work also requires periodic visible progress or a recorded progress-gap issue.
corePolicy.trustGatePolicy: Report ready, partial, unverified, blocked, needs_approval, hold, or unsafe before making completion or production-readiness claims.

skills.label: BEAI Development Steward Skill
skills.purpose: Guide AI-assisted development for non-developer and vibe-coding users with planning, approval gates, progress briefings, validation discipline, and release hygiene.

skills.label: BEAI Knowledge Loop Skill
skills.purpose: Turn work and session records into source-grounded BEAI package knowledge with daily review reporting, external signal fetch, bounded memory append, Telegram delivery, a persistent review lane, and a bounded Gateway watchdog.

skills.label: BEAI Doctor
skills.purpose: Diagnose BEAI-on-OpenClaw operating reliability, separate OpenClaw core issues from BEAI-owned runtime issues, classify repair boundaries, verify Telegram/Gateway/skill/plugin/package health, and read Knowledge Loop, Trust Gate, Agent Trust Ledger, and Connector Onboarding signals.

candidateModules.label: BEAI Doctor Runtime Trust Upgrade
evidence: beai-doctor copied into package skills directory
manifest lists beai-doctor as a formal skill
Trust Gate statuses are package-readable
Agent Trust Ledger seed is package-readable
Connector Onboarding checklist is package-readable
package check helper generates markdown and JSON reports
live beai-doctor skill is ready and hash-aligned with packaged beai-doctor
Telegram direct completion requires message_sent success and messageId evidence
BEAI Doctor classifies internal final_answer without visible send as beai-visible-delivery-contract-missing
BEAI Doctor classifies reply_payload_sending without message_sent/messageId as beai-visible-delivery-candidate-not-verified
BEAI Doctor classifies message_sent without messageId as beai-visible-delivery-message-sent-unverified
BEAI Doctor classifies long-running Telegram-driven work without visible progress as beai-long-running-visible-progress-missing

OpenClaw cron list reports Knowledge Loop operating jobs ok
new local internal zip package candidate and checksum are generated
excluded: live cron mutation by the package check helper
durable memory writes by the package check helper
external sends by the package check helper

routing.principle: Use the narrowest capability first, and do not promote session continuity to durable memory or onboarding suggestions to immediate automation.

upgradePolicy.existingInstallers: If v0.1.1 is already installed, update the existing BEAI skills in place and add only beai-development-steward as the new skill.
upgradePolicy.applyMode: Use Skill Workshop or the local OpenClaw safe skill-apply procedure. Do not modify BEAI Layer core, gateway, broad automation, or durable memory settings.
